content: Shared useNavItems hook, DesktopSidebar, DesktopTopBar shell wrapped in App.jsx flex container with lg:pl-72, keeping mobile pixels 100% untouched
Upgraded Gemini prompt in AdminSettings.jsx handleAiEnhance function to expert copywriter mode to expand, format, and enhance notification emails

PWA integration using vite-plugin-pwa, client-side screenshot compression using canvas in AdminSettings, login refresh flash fix via authTimedOut state and 3s safety net timeout, and desktop redirect fix using firebaseapp.com as authDomain.

Configure firebaseConfig.authDomain dynamically using window.location.hostname to use custom .vercel.app domain for production (relies on vercel.json rewrite of /__/auth/* to firebaseapp.com) and standard .firebaseapp.com domain for localhost development.

PWA: vite-plugin-pwa setup, autoUpdate registerType, manifest file in public directory. Compression: Client-side scale-and-convert with canvas and base64 parsing. Auth Flash Fix: authTimedOut boolean state with setTimeout instead of forcing authLoading=false.
